description: Eval set for the /status command — checks project health, active work, recent completions, and context determination

queries.name: happy_path
queries.prompt: Run /status on a clean repo with beads configured and some completed issues

assertions.check: Output includes beads stats (open, in-progress, completed counts) from `bd stats`
Output includes current branch name from git
Output includes recent commits from `git log --oneline -10`
Output determines a context category (new feature, continuing work, or review needed)

queries.name: in_progress_work
queries.prompt: Run /status when there is an in-progress beads issue
queries.setup: ISSUE_ID=$(bd create --title='eval-status-test' --type=task 2>&1 | grep -oE '[a-zA-Z]+-[a-zA-Z0-9]+' | head -1) && bd update $ISSUE_ID --status=in_progress && echo $ISSUE_ID > /tmp/eval-status-issue-id

assertions.check: Output shows the in-progress issue with its title and status
Output includes progress data from `beads-context.sh parse-progress` for the in-progress issue
Context is determined as 'Continuing work' since there is active in-progress work

queries.name: no_active_work
queries.prompt: Run /status when there are no in-progress beads issues

assertions.check: Output handles absence of in-progress issues gracefully (no crash or error)
Context is determined as 'New feature' or suggests starting new work with /plan
Output still shows beads stats and recent commits even with no active work
